query: SELECT DATE(createdAt) as d, COUNT(*) as c FROM chat_messages WHERE role = 'user' AND createdAt >= '2026-02-09' GROUP BY DATE(createdAt) ORDER BY DATE(createdAt) LIMIT 5;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user zuxFhcSmgfRMF3Y.5443ef0e52ed --database 7xKVuVPoe4TavcqcxPZkpC --execute SELECT DATE(createdAt) as d, COUNT(*) as c FROM chat_messages WHERE role = 'user' AND createdAt >= '2026-02-09' GROUP BY DATE(createdAt) ORDER BY DATE(createdAt) LIMIT 5;
